mapper.select: SELECT member_id, refresh_token, del_yn, ip_address, user_agent, reg_dt, chg_dt, expire_dt, del_id FROM refresh_tokens WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken}
SELECT member_id, refresh_token, del_yn, ip_address, user_agent, reg_dt, chg_dt, expire_dt, del_id FROM refresh_tokens WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY reg_dt DESC

SELECT member_id, refresh_token, del_yn, ip_address, user_agent, reg_dt, chg_dt, expire_dt, del_id FROM refresh_tokens WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND del_yn = 'N' AND expire_dt > NOW() ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens ( member_id, refresh_token, del_yn, ip_address, user_agent, reg_dt, chg_dt, expire_dt, del_id ,reg_id, chg_id ) VALUES ( #{memberId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refreshToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delYn}, #{ipAddress, typeHandler=com.common.auth.common.config.InetAddressTypeHandler}, #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{chgDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW()), #{expireDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{memberId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{memberId,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET del_yn = 'Y', expire_dt = #{expireDt}, del_id = #{delId} WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken}
UPDATE refresh_tokens SET del_yn = 'Y', expire_dt = #{expireDt}, del_id = #{delId} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM refresh_tokens WHERE expire_dt < NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM refresh_tokens WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refresh_tokens WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND del_yn = 'N' AND expire_dt > NOW()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refresh_tokens WHERE expire_dt < NOW()
SELECT user_id, refresh_token, del_yn, ip_address, user_agent, reg_dt, expire_dt, expire_dt, del_id FROM refresh_tokens WHERE expire_dt < NOW() ORDER BY expire_dt ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET del_yn = 'Y', expire_dt = #{expireDt}, del_id = #{delId} WHERE expire_dt < NOW() AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM refresh_tokens WHERE del_yn = 'Y' AND expire_dt < #{cutoffDate}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refresh_tokens WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND expire_dt > NOW()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM refresh_tokens WHERE del_yn = 'Y'
